fields.name: agreement_type
fields.description: Classification of the agreement. One of: NDA | MSA | MNDA | MOU | LOI | Other

fields.name: effective_date
fields.description: The date the agreement becomes effective, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: expiration_date
fields.description: The date the agreement expires or terminates, format YYYY-MM-DD (null if perpetual or not stated)

fields.name: auto_renew
fields.description: Boolean — true if the agreement contains an automatic renewal clause

fields.name: renewal_notice_days
fields.description: Number of days' advance notice required to prevent auto-renewal, as integer (null if not applicable)

fields.name: amendment_number
fields.description: If this document is an amendment or addendum, the amendment number as integer (e.g., 1 for "Amendment No. 1"; null if original agreement)

fields.name: party_1_name
fields.description: Full legal name of the first party

fields.name: party_1_role
fields.description: Role of the first party. One of: Disclosing | Receiving | Both (for mutual agreements)

fields.name: party_1_state
fields.description: State or jurisdiction of incorporation/organization for party 1 (two-letter state code or country if non-US)

fields.name: party_2_name
fields.description: Full legal name of the second party

fields.name: party_2_role
fields.description: Role of the second party. One of: Disclosing | Receiving | Both

fields.name: party_2_state
fields.description: State or jurisdiction of incorporation/organization for party 2

fields.name: governing_law
fields.description: The state or jurisdiction whose laws govern the agreement (e.g., "CA", "NY", "DE", "England and Wales")

fields.name: confidentiality_period_years
fields.description: Duration of the confidentiality obligation in years as decimal (null if perpetual or not explicitly stated in years)

fields.name: confidentiality_scope
fields.description: Brief description of what information is deemed confidential (up to 200 chars)

fields.name: permitted_uses
fields.description: Array of strings describing the permitted uses of confidential information (e.g., ["Evaluating potential business relationship", "Performing services under the MSA"])

fields.name: excluded_information
fields.description: Array of strings listing categories of information excluded from confidentiality obligations (e.g., ["Publicly available information", "Independently developed information", "Information received from third parties without restriction"])

fields.name: return_or_destroy_obligation
fields.description: Boolean — true if the agreement requires return or destruction of confidential materials upon termination or request

fields.name: non_solicitation_clause
fields.description: Boolean — true if the agreement contains a non-solicitation clause restricting hiring of the other party's employees

fields.name: non_compete_clause
fields.description: Boolean — true if the agreement contains a non-compete or non-competition clause

fields.name: liquidated_damages_amount
fields.description: The liquidated damages amount stated in the agreement as decimal (null if not specified)

fields.name: arbitration_clause
fields.description: Boolean — true if the agreement requires disputes to be resolved by arbitration

fields.name: arbitration_venue
fields.description: City and/or state where arbitration proceedings would be held (null if no arbitration clause)

sections.title: Dates And Terms
sections.description: Dates And Terms fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Document Details
sections.description: Document Details fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Parties
sections.description: Parties fields extracted from the document.

completeness_checklist.description: All required fields are present or explicitly null with low confidence when absent.
Each declared section was reviewed for extractable evidence.
Object array fields use their item_schema for consistent nested extraction.
